## Candidate 0
```sql

{{ config(materialized='table') }}

WITH source_opportunity AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        name,
        stagename,
        closedate,
        amount,
        currencyisocode,
        accountid
    FROM {{ source('fixture_messy_data_v2_src', 'opportunity') }}
)
SELECT
    id AS "Id",
    COALESCE(name, 'Untitled Opportunity') AS "Name",
    CASE
        WHEN LOWER(TRIM(stagename)) IN ('closed won', 'won', 'gewonnen', 'abgeschlossen (gewonnen)') THEN 'Closed Won'
        WHEN LOWER(TRIM(stagename)) IN ('closed lost', 'lost', 'verloren', 'abgeschlossen (verloren)') THEN 'Closed Lost'
        WHEN LOWER(TRIM(stagename)) IN ('qualification', 'qualifikation', 'quali') THEN 'Qualification'
        WHEN LOWER(TRIM(stagename)) IN ('prospecting', 'prospect', 'in kontakt') THEN 'Prospecting'
        WHEN LOWER(TRIM(stagename)) IN ('in prüfung') THEN 'Negotiation/Review' -- Best guess based on translation
        WHEN LOWER(TRIM(stagename)) IN ('needs analysis') THEN 'Needs Analysis'
        WHEN LOWER(TRIM(stagename)) IN ('value proposition') THEN 'Value Proposition'
        WHEN LOWER(TRIM(stagename)) IN ('id. decision makers', 'identification of decision makers') THEN 'Id. Decision Makers'
        WHEN LOWER(TRIM(stagename)) IN ('perception analysis') THEN 'Perception Analysis'
        WHEN LOWER(TRIM(stagename)) IN ('proposal/price quote', 'proposal', 'price quote') THEN 'Proposal/Price Quote'
        WHEN LOWER(TRIM(stagename)) IN ('negotiation/review', 'negotiation', 'review') THEN 'Negotiation/Review'
        ELSE 'Prospecting' -- Default for unknown stages or NULL
    END AS "StageName",
    COALESCE(
        TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(closedate, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
        TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(closedate, 'MM/DD/YYYY'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
        TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(closedate, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
        TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(closedate, 'DD.MM.YYYY'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
        '2999-12-31' -- Default date if all parsing fails, ensuring NOT NULL
    ) AS "CloseDate",
    CASE
        WHEN amount IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE
            CASE
                WHEN REGEXP_REPLACE(
                        REPLACE(
                            REPLACE(LOWER(TRIM(amount)), 'eur ', ''),
                            '.', ''
                        ),
                        ',', '.'
                    ) ~ '^[+-]?\d+(\.\d+)?$'
                THEN
                    CAST(
                        REGEXP_REPLACE(
                            REPLACE(
                                REPLACE(LOWER(TRIM(amount)), 'eur ', ''),
                                '.', ''
                            ),
                            ',', '.'
                        ) AS DOUBLE PRECISION
                    )
                ELSE NULL
            END
    END AS "Amount",
    currencyisocode AS "CurrencyIsoCode",
    accountid AS "AccountId",
    id AS "Legacy_Opportunity_ID__c",
    NULL AS "CreatedDate",
    NULL AS "LastModifiedDate",
    0 AS "IsDeleted"
FROM source_opportunity

```

## Candidate 1
```sql

{{ config(materialized='table') }}

SELECT
    s.id AS "Id",
    COALESCE(s.name, 'Unknown Opportunity') AS "Name",
    CASE
        WHEN LOWER(s.stagename) IN ('closed won', 'closedwon') THEN 'Closed Won'
        WHEN LOWER(s.stagename) IN ('closed lost', 'lost') THEN 'Closed Lost'
        WHEN LOWER(s.stagename) IN ('prospecting', 'prospect') THEN 'Prospecting'
        WHEN LOWER(s.stagename) = 'in prüfung' THEN 'Negotiation/Review'
        -- Default to Prospecting if not explicitly mapped or NULL
        ELSE 'Prospecting'
    END AS "StageName",
    COALESCE(
        (CASE
            WHEN s.closedate ~ '^\d{8}$' THEN TO_DATE(s.closedate, 'YYYYMMDD') -- e.g., 20260401
            WHEN s.closedate ~ '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$' THEN TO_DATE(s.closedate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') -- e.g., 2027-01-15
            WHEN s.closedate ~ '^\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{4}$' THEN TO_DATE(s.closedate, 'MM/DD/YYYY') -- e.g., 2/6/2025
            WHEN s.closedate ~ '^\d{1,2}\.\d{1,2}\.\d{4}$' THEN TO_DATE(s.closedate, 'DD.MM.YYYY') -- e.g., 16.11.2026
            ELSE NULL
        END)::TEXT,
        '1900-01-01' -- Default for unparseable or NULL dates
    ) AS "CloseDate",
    CAST(
        CASE
            WHEN s.amount IS NULL OR TRIM(s.amount) = '' THEN NULL
            ELSE
                -- Step 1: Clean the string, removing all non-essential characters
                -- Keep digits, comma, dot, and negative sign
                (SELECT
                    CASE
                        -- European format: contains comma, and either no dot or dot appears before comma
                        -- e.g., '1.234,56' -> dot is thousands, comma is decimal
                        WHEN cleaned_amount_raw LIKE '%.%,%' AND POSITION(',', cleaned_amount_raw) > POSITION('.', cleaned_amount_raw)
                        THEN REPLACE(REPLACE(cleaned_amount_raw, '.', ''), ',', '.') -- Remove dots, then change comma to dot
                        -- Case where only comma is the decimal separator (e.g. 123,45)
                        WHEN cleaned_amount_raw LIKE '%,%'
                        THEN REPLACE(cleaned_amount_raw, ',', '.')
                        -- Otherwise (standard format or no decimal), use as is
                        ELSE cleaned_amount_raw
                    END
                FROM (
                    SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(LOWER(TRIM(s.amount)), '[^0-9.,-]+', '', 'g') AS cleaned_amount_raw
                ) AS _subquery
                )
        END AS DOUBLE PRECISION
    ) AS "Amount",
    CASE LOWER(s.currencyisocode)
        WHEN 'euro' THEN 'EUR'
        WHEN 'dollar' THEN 'USD'
        WHEN 'chf' THEN 'CHF'
        WHEN 'usd' THEN 'USD'
        WHEN 'gbp' THEN 'GBP'
        WHEN '£' THEN 'GBP'
        WHEN 'eur' THEN 'EUR'
        ELSE NULL
    END AS "CurrencyIsoCode",
    s.accountid AS "AccountId",
    s.id AS "Legacy_Opportunity_ID__c",
    NULL AS "CreatedDate",
    NULL AS "LastModifiedDate",
    0 AS "IsDeleted"
FROM
    {{ source('fixture_messy_data_v2_src', 'opportunity') }} AS s
```

                        THEN REPLACE(REPLACE(cleaned_amount_raw, '.', ''), ',', '.') -- Remove dots, then change comma to dot
                        -- Case where only comma is the decimal separator (e.g. 123,45)
                        WHEN cleaned_amount_raw LIKE '%,%'
                        THEN REPLACE(cleaned_amount_raw, ',', '.')
                        -- Otherwise (standard format or no decimal), use as is
                        ELSE cleaned_amount_raw
                    END
                FROM (
                    SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(LOWER(TRIM(s.amount)), '[^0-9.,-]+', '', 'g') AS cleaned_amount_raw
                ) AS _subquery
                )
        END AS DOUBLE PRECISION
    ) AS "Amount",
    CASE LOWER(s.currencyisocode)
        WHEN 'euro' THEN 'EUR'
        WHEN 'dollar' THEN 'USD'
        WHEN 'chf' THEN 'CHF'
        WHEN 'usd' THEN 'USD'
        WHEN 'gbp' THEN 'GBP'
        WHEN '£' THEN 'GBP'
        WHEN 'eur' THEN 'EUR'
        ELSE NULL
    END AS "CurrencyIsoCode",
    s.accountid AS "AccountId",
    s.id AS "Legacy_Opportunity_ID__c",
    NULL AS "CreatedDate",
    NULL AS "LastModifiedDate",
    0 AS "IsDeleted"
FROM
    {{ source('fixture_messy_data_v2_src', 'opportunity') }} AS s

        WHEN LOWER(TRIM(stagename)) IN ('closed lost', 'lost', 'verloren', 'abgeschlossen (verloren)') THEN 'Closed Lost'
        WHEN LOWER(TRIM(stagename)) IN ('qualification', 'qualifikation', 'quali') THEN 'Qualification'
        WHEN LOWER(TRIM(stagename)) IN ('prospecting', 'prospect', 'in kontakt') THEN 'Prospecting'
        WHEN LOWER(TRIM(stagename)) IN ('in prüfung') THEN 'Negotiation/Review'
        WHEN LOWER(TRIM(stagename)) IN ('needs analysis') THEN 'Needs Analysis'
        WHEN LOWER(TRIM(stagename)) IN ('value proposition') THEN 'Value Proposition'
        WHEN LOWER(TRIM(stagename)) IN ('id. decision makers', 'identification of decision makers') THEN 'Id. Decision Makers'
        WHEN LOWER(TRIM(stagename)) IN ('perception analysis') THEN 'Perception Analysis'
        WHEN LOWER(TRIM(stagename)) IN ('proposal/price quote', 'proposal', 'price quote') THEN 'Proposal/Price Quote'
        WHEN LOWER(TRIM(stagename)) IN ('negotiation/review', 'negotiation', 'review') THEN 'Negotiation/Review'
        ELSE 'Prospecting'
    END AS "StageName",
    CASE
        WHEN closedate ~ '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$' THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(closedate, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
        WHEN closedate ~ '^\d{8}$' THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(closedate, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
        WHEN closedate ~ '^\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{4}$' THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(closedate, 'MM/DD/YYYY'), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
        WHEN closedate ~ '^\d{1,2}\.\d{1,2}\.\d{4}$' THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(closedate, 'DD.MM.YYYY'), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
        ELSE '2999-12-31'
    END AS "CloseDate",
    CASE
        WHEN amount IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE
            CASE
                WHEN REGEXP_REPLACE(
                        REPLACE(
                            REPLACE(LOWER(TRIM(amount)), 'eur ', ''),
                            '.', ''
                        ),
                        ',', '.'
                    ) ~ '^[+-]?\d+(\.\d+)?$'

                            ),
                            ',', '.'
                        ) AS DOUBLE PRECISION
                    )
                ELSE NULL
            END
    END AS "Amount",
    currencyisocode AS "CurrencyIsoCode",
    accountid AS "AccountId",
    id AS "Legacy_Opportunity_ID__c",
    NULL AS "CreatedDate",
    NULL AS "LastModifiedDate",
    0 AS "IsDeleted"
FROM source_opportunity
